findings.title: Tab character inserted in validator script indentation
findings.rationale: The literal tab in scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs was normalized to spaces; rg -nP "\t" now reports no matches and node --check passes.

findings.title: TEN trace refs are validated for S01 surface parity but not against a separate authoritative registry
findings.rationale: S01's scope is to declare and pin the specified TEN-001 through TEN-008 primary implementation anchors across contract, policy, fixture, validator, and README. A separate authoritative tenant-requirement registry cross-check is deferred to a future validation-registry slice.

findings.title: Claude evidence was referenced before the evidence file existed
findings.rationale: This claude-review-result.json records the actual completed single Claude CLI run with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 closeout blockers.

p3.finding: Tab character inserted in validator script indentation.
TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs are validated for self-consistency only, not against a separate authoritative requirement registry.
p3.rationale: The S01 deliverable is the service entrypoint contract anchor. Registry-level cross-checking is outside this subphase and deferred without changing S01 production readiness.

p3.finding: Claude evidence reference pre-stated pass before the review artifact existed.
p3.rationale: The actual single Claude CLI output is recorded here and in adjudication.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS, blocks_subphase_closeout false, blocks_goal_closeout false, with three P3 findings and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
